creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tested it now with a FreeBSD 13.2 install CD in a virtual machine.
Just went into /usr/ports/lang/f2c and did a make.
It succeeded.

I will try now to fetch a fresh ports dir based on main branch via:
git clone https://git.FreeBSD.org/ports.git /usr/ports

I let you know the results, but I think the clone will take some hours.
